station_arrive.speaker: Narrator
station_arrive.text:
The station is nearly empty. The clock reads 11:47 PM.
A train hums in the distance.

ending_walk_final.speaker: Narrator
ending_walk_final.text:
The gate opens. You step through.
The train is waiting. You find a seat by the window.
The rain streaks past the glass as the train pulls away.

— Keep Walking —

ending_turnback.speaker: Narrator
ending_turnback.text:
You turn away from the gate.
The exit door is still open. Rain blows in from the street.
You go back the way you came.

— Turn Back —

ending_stay_entry.speaker: Narrator
ending_stay_entry.text:
The bench is cold. You sit.
The last train arrives. The doors open. You don't move.
The doors close. The train pulls away.

— Stay —
